arts.ttl: Shock in Italy: Fiorentina's Bove collapses in match against Inter
arts.sum: Fiorentina player Edoardo Bove collapsed unconscious on the pitch in the 17th minute of the match against Inter Milan. Medical services quickly entered the field to attend to him and the players formed a circle around him to prevent their teammate from being seen .

arts.ttl: Fiorentina-Inter Milan halted after Bove collapses
arts.sum: Fiorentina midfielder Edoardo Bove was taken off the pitch in an ambulance after collapsing shortly after the start of their Serie A match against Inter Milan on Sunday.

arts.ttl: Fiorentina midfielder Bove collapses on pitch during Inter game
arts.sum: Fiorentina midfielder Edoardo Bove collapsed on the pitch during his team's Serie A match at home to Inter Milan.

arts.ttl: Fiorentina v Inter suspended after Bove collapse
arts.sum: Fiorentina midfielder Edoardo Bove collapsed and taken to hospital as a Serie A match against Inter Milan was suspended on Sunday.

arts.ttl: Fiorentina’s Edoardo Bove breathing safe after collapsing in Inter game

arts.ttl: Fiorentina midfielder Edoardo Bove collapses during Serie A match
arts.sum: The Italian Under-21 international was stretchered off to an ambulance near the pitch with players returning to the dressing room

arts.ttl: Edoardo Bove collapses during Fiorentina vs Inter match as players left in tears
arts.sum: Fiorentina and Inter were playing in Serie A when midfielder Edoardo Bove collapsed on the field, with paramedics treating the player as the match was suspended

arts.ttl: Shocking Incident halts Fiorentina-Inter match as Edoardo Bove collapses on field
arts.sum: A terrifying moment unfolded at the Stadio Artemio Franchi in Florence during the Serie A clash between Fiorentina and Inter Milan. The post Shocking Incident halts Fiorentina-Inter match as Edoardo Bove collapses on field appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Fiorentina vs. Inter interrupted over medical emergency for Bove
arts.sum: The Serie A match between Fiorentina and Inter has been interrupted following a medical emergency...
